safety_use_cases.label: Vehicle speeding detection across lanes
safety_use_cases.description: Granite Ridge Works wants Voxel to detect and track vehicle speeding across multiple warehouse and dock lanes at Hub East, using bi-directional monitoring and fixed-point distance measurements to calibrate speed and better track incidents.

evidence.quote: The door, which is, and also if we wanted to, we could do a speed camera, which we're going to talk about next, right, Shawn?
evidence.speaker: Morgan Marlowe <fake.morgan.marlowe@graniteridgeworks.com>

evidence.quote: All right, so here we've got the speeding shots pulled up.
evidence.speaker: Shawn Abbott <fake.shawn.abbott@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: So in terms of how speeding works, we need to pick, first off, we can do bi-directional.
evidence.speaker: Shawn Abbott <fake.shawn.abbott@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: So we need to, we need you guys to measure a point, two different points, and give us the distance.
evidence.speaker: Shawn Abbott <fake.shawn.abbott@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: And from camera angles, I do agree that the speed limits will definitely help us with being able to track those incidents a lot better.
evidence.speaker: Darian Pryor <fake.darian.pryor@graniteridgeworks.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Safety vest (PPE) compliance monitoring in designated areas
safety_use_cases.description: Granite Ridge Works is using Voxel to monitor safety vest compliance within marked zones and troubleshoot areas where designated safety-vest spots are not being detected.

evidence.quote: Are we going to have to put the safety vest lines in there now, Gio?
evidence.speaker: Shawn Abbott <fake.shawn.abbott@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: The lines, everything's still on there for safety vests and everything.
evidence.speaker: Tatum Whitman <fake.tatum.whitman@graniteridgeworks.com>

evidence.quote: We might, I might call you about a few spots that are, that are not, that are designated as safety vest spots, but they're not picking up, but.
evidence.speaker: Morgan Marlowe <fake.morgan.marlowe@graniteridgeworks.com>
